title: Animation Overhaul
description: Smooth and interactive animations. Customizable and compatible!
body:
Completely overhaul the player's animations with smooth animations that interact with the world

Configurable and customizable! You can replace the animations yourself with a resource pack!

**Requires [Necronomicon API](https://modrinth.com/mod/necronomicon)** # ✨ Features #### Smooth & Interactive Player Animations

## Compatibility One of the main reasons behind the development of this mod was that the alternatives weren't compatible with famous mods such as _Better Combat_ or _Spell Engine_. **Animation Overhaul fixes that by adding special support for those mods!** ## Configurability From enabling individual animations to changing their speed and transitions! Completely configurable. ## Resource Pack Support Want your own animations instead? You can change the animations using a resource pack! ## Credits - [Kelvin285 for the super cool animations and being the base of this project. His animations are MIT Licensed!](https://github.com/Kelvin285/KelvinsBetterPlayerAnimations)
